prompt_text: Write a recommendation letter for Wei who is applying for an MBA program. Emphasize leadership and communication.
response_text:
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution/Company]
[Date]

Admissions Committee
[Business School Name]
[Business School Address]

Dear Admissions Committee,

I am writing to wholeheartedly recommend Wei for admission to the MBA program at [Business School Name]. As Wei's [supervisor/managing director], I have had the pleasure of observing and guiding their professional growth for [length of time] and can confidently attest to their exceptional leadership skills and outstanding communication abilities.

During their time at [previous employer], Wei demonstrated a remarkable capacity to lead cross-functional teams and drive project initiatives forward. Their leadership style is characterized by a unique blend of strategic vision, collaborative spirit, and results-driven focus. Under their guidance, teams have consistently delivered high-quality outcomes, often exceeding expectations and setting new standards for excellence.

Wei's communication skills are equally impressive. They possess an uncanny ability to distill complex ideas into clear, concise language, making them an effective communicator with both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Their presentations are engaging, informative, and always well-received by audiences. In addition, their written communication is articulate, well-structured, and free of errors.

One of Wei's greatest strengths lies in their ability to balance competing demands and priorities. They are adept at managing multiple projects simultaneously, navigating complex organizational dynamics, and fostering a culture of open communication and collaboration. Their exceptional problem-solving skills and adaptability have enabled them to thrive in a rapidly changing business environment.

As a team member, Wei is a valuable asset, always willing to lend a helping hand or offer guidance and support to colleagues. Their positive attitude, enthusiasm, and dedication to excellence have earned them the respect and admiration of their peers.

I strongly believe that Wei would be an outstanding addition to the MBA program at [Business School Name]. Their unique blend of leadership skills, communication abilities, and business acumen make them an exceptional candidate, poised for success in their future endeavors. I highly recommend Wei for admission and am confident that they will make valuable contributions to the program.

If you require any additional information, please do not hesitate to contact me. I would be more than happy to provide any further details.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution/Company]
[Contact Information]
